title: Giant Nether Tree
description: Adds a giant Nether Tree to the nether dimension
body:
### Giant Nether Tree

**This Mod adds a giant Nether Tree to the nether dimension**
![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d60c07d5e6a6382168dcf3db4c1c25e16167fc5.jpeg)

The terrain around the nether tree is designed to blend naturally with the nether dimension.
The Tree can spawn in the Crimson Forest and Nether Wastes biome
Perfect spot to build a nether base nearby

**Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks**
